---
title: "Interactions"
---

```{r, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, error=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
source("helpers.R")

interactions <- read.csv("data/Interactions.csv")

unique(interactions[c("AMGABID", "AGAMYID", "Amyloid.UniProt.ID", "ABID", "Antibody.Name..if.not.INN.", 
                      "Impact.of.the.antibody.on.amyloid.formation", "Experimental.Model",
                      "DOI")]) |>
  dplyr::mutate(Impact.of.the.antibody.on.amyloid.formation = 
                  factor(generate_interaction_assesments(Impact.of.the.antibody.on.amyloid.formation)),
                Experimental.Model = factor(Experimental.Model),
                ) |>
  setNames(c("AMGABID", "AGAMYID", "UniProt ID", "ABID", "Antibody name", 
                      "Impact on amyloid formation", "Experimental model",
                      "DOI")) |>
  DT::datatable(escape = FALSE, 
                style = "bootstrap5",
                class = "wrap",
                filter = "top",
                extensions = "Buttons", 
                rownames = FALSE,
                options = list(pageLength = 50,
                               dom = "Bfrtip",
                               buttons = c("copy", "csv"),
                               columnDefs = list(
                                 list(targets = 0, render = DT::JS("function(data, type, row, meta) {
                      return '<a href=\"interactions/' + data + '.html\">' + data + '</a>';
                    }")),
                                 list(targets = 1, render = DT::JS("function(data, type, row, meta) {
                      return '<a href=\"amyloids/' + data + '.html\">' + data + '</a>';
                    }")),
                    list(targets = 2, render = render_uniprot),
                    list(targets = 7, render = render_doi),
                    list(targets = 3, render = DT::JS("function(data, type, row, meta) {
                      return '<a href=\"antibodies/' + data + '.html\" target=\"_blank\">' + data + '</a>';
                    }"))
                    )
                ))
```
